title: Add freebsd golangci lint run; fix remaining freebsd warnings
body:
This PR builds on top of #25726 (and fixes one issue from there) and focuses on freebsd.

It fixes some more freebsd related warnings (see individual commits for details), and enables running golangci-lint on freebsd.

To speed up linting, I added save/restore for golangci-lint cache, which saves some time (measured on Cirrus CI):
 - from 8 to 2 minutes on 2 CPUs / 4 GB RAM
 - from 14 to 3 minutes on 4 CPUs / 8 GB RAM

~It also removes 'seccomp' build tag from freebsd builds.~ Moved out to https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/25773

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body: I like the idea, +1 from me. Your CI errors seem unrelated to the FreeBSD bit.
It looks like this PR depends on #25726. I think CI is failing because it tried to run the build 31 times and got a timeout. I suggest squashing some commits.

This one is ready for review.

The only thing I don't yet understand is why we build podman on freebsd with seccomp tag set (probably just an oversight).
